description_long: This kiosk features a hexagonal base platform with a large circular map or graphic at its center, surrounded by several vertical display panels. The panels are arranged in a semi-enclosed layout, providing both privacy and display space, and some feature printed graphics or maps. Above the kiosk, floating three-dimensional text spells out 'Khine Thin Aye,' serving as prominent signage. The structure is predominantly white, with some grayscale map imagery and subtle colored lines on the central map. The kiosk appears to be constructed from lightweight panels, likely composite or plastic, and is designed for informational or exhibition purposes in an urban environment. The open layout allows for easy entry and movement within the kiosk, making it suitable for public interaction.
description: A modern, open-layout kiosk with a hexagonal base, central circular map, and multiple white display panels, topped by floating 3D text signage. The design is clean and exhibition-focused, with prominent map graphics and ample space for visitors.
description_view_0: From this angle, the kiosk's hexagonal base, central map, and the prominent 3D text signage above are clearly visible, along with several display panels featuring graphics.
description_view_1: This view highlights the open entryway and the arrangement of the display panels, with the central map and signage still visible but from a more side-on perspective.
description_view_2: Seen from the rear, the kiosk's display panels form a partial enclosure, and the floating signage is reversed, with the central map still visible.
description_view_3: This angle shows the opposite side of the kiosk, emphasizing the open layout, the arrangement of the panels, and the central map, with the signage above.
attribute_signage_type: 3D printed sign, floating above the kiosk, text reads 'Khine Thin Aye'
attribute_roof_design: none; open-air with floating signage above
